CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Christine Louie, Esq. appeared for plaintiff St. Croix Press, Inc.
No appearance by defendant Montgomery Research, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on April 22, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 3, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 26,2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff St. Croix Press, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Montgomery Research, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $263,004.91.
Prejudgment Interest - $37,033.70.
Attorney Fees - $13,750.00.
Costs - $450.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $314,238.61.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
